title: From Vision to Action
text:
[cite_start]Building on the foundation laid by the 2022–2024 Creation Care Task Force, a new team was commissioned in September 2025. [cite_start]Our mission is to provide congregations with practical tools and theological grounding.
We focus our efforts in three vital areas:


[cite_start]Slowing the progress of climate change by shrinking our environmental footprint.



[cite_start]Building resilience to ensure our congregations remain safe and prepared.



[cite_start]Re-imagining our relationship with Earth as stewards of God’s Creation.

title: From Vision to Action

title: From Vision to Action
text:
🚀 Audacious Goals

[cite_start]Evacuation Preparations: Every congregation to have a plan for helping those lacking resources.
[cite_start]The “Refugia” Network: Equipping parishes to serve as community refuges with solar and battery backup.

title: Mitigation: Reducing Our Footprint
text:
[cite_start]Goal: To achieve carbon neutrality in all facilities and operations by 2030.

Essential Audits

Energy Audit
Water Audit
Waste Audit



Easy Wins (Under $500)

[cite_start]Lighting: Replace all bulbs with LEDs.
[cite_start]Leak Detection: Test toilets every 6 months.
[cite_start]Hospitality: Use ceramic mugs instead of plastic.
